code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test19-MAY-2022Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and significant proteinuria, indicating possible glomerular damage. Urine is abnormal in appearance and color, with low specific gravity, glucosuria, ketonuria, and bilirubinuria. HbA1c is low, which may reflect recent hypoglycemia or anemia. Findings are consistent with possible acute or chronic kidney disease with metabolic disturbances; further nephrological evaluation is recommended.
